_doc_settings_json: settings.json is DELIBERATELY ABSENT from .files — it is user-owned config the installer never symlink-deploys. On `install` (NOT `agents-only`, which skips it), wire_hooks performs an idempotent, timestamped-backup MERGE that adds ONLY the Atrium hook event-bindings into ~/.claude/settings.json — it never deletes or overwrites user-owned keys, and re-running is a no-op once the bindings are present. Run `glass-atrium doctor` to surface any DORMANT (deployed-but-unwired) hook bindings. The required binding set the doctor checks is the single SoT array `EXPECTED_HOOK_BINDINGS` in `lib/ga-env.sh` (matcher-scoped — the same hook may bind under multiple matchers, each tracked independently, e.g. validate-secret-scan under BOTH Write|Edit AND Bash).
